display_information.name: Nova by Joveo
display_information.description: Joveo's recruitment marketing intelligence assistant. Ask Nova about publishers, channels, benchmarks, CPC/CPA data, and budget recommendations across 33 countries.
display_information.long_description: Nova is Joveo's AI-powered recruitment marketing intelligence chatbot. It provides instant answers to questions about publisher performance, channel benchmarks, CPC/CPA metrics, salary data, budget allocation, and global supply across 33 countries and 1,238+ publishers. Nova learns from your team's answers and gets smarter over time.
